channel.title: Valery Ozenne
channel.description:
Reproducible Science is good.
Replicated Science is better.

item.title: Melanie Lagadec is joining the team
item.description: Dr. Melanie Lagadec is joining the THERMOLYSE project. We welcome her in the Team.

item.title: Organising the Journée SFT dedicated to in heat transfert modeling in Life Science
item.description: Organising with Jean-Laurent Gardarein, Jean-luc Battaglia and Léa Penazi the “journée SFT” Société Française de Thermique dedicated to heat transfert modeling in life science link.

item.title: Journée SFT dedicated to reduced model in heat transfert modeling
item.description: The team (Nino, Manon, Ida, Mariana, Jean-Luc and myself) is attending at Paris the “journée SFT” Société Française de Thermique dedicated to inverse method in heat transfert modeling link.

item.title: Eya Ben Amor is joining the team
item.description: Eya Ben Amor is doing her master 2 internship over the spring-summer 2026 season at CRMSB. In collaboration with I2M (Bordeaux) and LMU (Munich), she will develop new workflow and image processing tools for the creation of thermal numerical models for the treatment of liver tumors. We welcome her to Bordeaux.

item.title: The team is presenting one abstracts at EUROMIT2026
item.description:
Gwendal Durand-Chatton is presenting his work with Prism and Mitovsac EULITT2026.

  • The mitochondrial TRPV1 receptor: a therapeutical target for heatstroke management? by Gwendal Durand-Chatton.

This work was supported by THERMOLYSE

item.title: The team is presenting one abstracts at EULITT2026
item.description:
Dr. Manon Desclides is presenting our work with CHU-LILLE and Onco-Thai at EULITT2026 during the session “Oncology”.

  • 14:51- 14:58 C10 Experimentally validated thermal digital twin for interstitial photodynamic therapy (iPDT): an ex vivo proof of concept. Manon Desclides.

item.title: The team is presenting two abstracts at RITS2026
item.description:
Nino Avetikovi and Dr. Manon Desclides are presenting their work at RITS2026 during the session “Innovations technologiques en santé 2”.

  • Magnetic resonance thermometry validation of bioheat transfer model for lesion size prediction in liver tumor microwave ablation procedures by Nino Avetikovi.

  • Investigating the thermal effect of photodynamic therapy for glioblastoma treatment by Manon Desclides.

This work was supported by SMART-HEAT This work has received financial support from the CNRS through the MITI interdisciplinary programs under its exploratory research program under the project [CHAUPATAT].

item.title: A post-doc position is now opened in MRI and thermoregulation
item.description:
L’offre détaillée est accessible à ce lien

Pour toute question, n’hésitez pas à me contacter.

item.title: Hippolyte Salles is joining the team
item.description: Hippolyte Salles is doing his master 2 internship over the spring-summer 2026 season at CRMSB. He will develop new segmentation algorithms and image processing tools for the creation of thermal numerical models for the treatment of liver tumors. We welcome him to Bordeaux.

item.title: Pre-Release-Of-Software-Suite-MilleFeuille
item.description:
The Millefeuille ecosystem is a software suite with a strong emphasis on cardiac microstructure that include:

  • Millefeuille extractor (done)

  • Millefeuille calculator (done)

  • Millefeuille segmentator (on going)

  • Millefeuille predictor (starting)

Millefeuille Services, a private (to be open source after publication) branch focused on the study of structural heterogeneities associated with cardiac arrhythmia.

link to the code
